WE HIRE
Tailor Careers
Career Opportunities
As Canada’s premier uniform tailor, Andrei Master Tailors has acquired a remarkable reputation for its quality garments and excellent service. As the company grows and more customers learn to appreciate the quality, fit and service that we provide, we need more experienced tailors of various expertise levels. The company offers competitive wages for tailors with opportunities for advancement in the trade.
Immigrant Tailors
Since there is no trade school teaching tailoring in Canada, most of our tailors are immigrants that have become Canadian citizens. In fact, we most likely have more European-trained master tailors on staff than any other tailoring facility in Canada. We have tailors mostly from Romania, Ukraine, Syria and India nevertheless, we seek tailors from any country who have a tradition of training tailors.
New Brunswick Canada
